## TOP INSIGHTS

| # | Insight | Domínio | Fonte |
|---|---------|---------|-------|
| 1 | ADUCATE é o framework de scripting: Aim, Difficulty, Understand, Credibility, Action Plan, Teach, Exit | video-scripting | Video Ad Scripting Process |
| 2 | Schema Violation abre um "portal de aprendizado" no cérebro — atenção 100% + absorção máxima | ad-creative | Bonus: Russell Brunson |
| 3 | Three-Tier Ad: filme 1 vídeo, edite em 3 (window/in-store/checkout) | ad-creative | Bonus: Russell Brunson |
| 4 | YouTube CPA para book buyer de Frank Kern: $16 (vs $23 no Facebook) com ROI melhor no funil | paid-media | Bonus: Frank Kern |
| 5 | Customer Moment Mapping: intercepte momentos MAIS CEDO que os competidores para escala massiva | youtube-advertising | Bonus: Russell Brunson |
| 6 | Session-based targeting: keywords funcionam por 30-60 min cross-platform (Google → YouTube) | audience-targeting | Module 1 + Module 4 |
| 7 | Custom Affinity audiences podem escalar até $20K/dia quando otimizadas | audience-targeting | Bonus: Russell Brunson |
| 8 | TrueView billing: só paga após 30s ou click — vídeos de 22s podem gerar tráfego grátis | youtube-advertising | Bonus: Frank Kern |
| 9 | Similar Audiences = 10x o tamanho da lista uploaded | audience-targeting | Bonus: Russell Brunson |
| 10 | 5½ Power Statements: But, Because, Yes Set, Ideal Identity, So You Can, Tee-ups | video-scripting | Video Ad Drafting |

---

## PADRÕES IDENTIFICADOS

| Padrão | Descrição |
|--------|-----------|
| Psychology-first | Tom sempre fundamenta técnicas em psicologia (schema violation, compliance triggers) |
| Offline→Online | Traduz conceitos digitais em analogias de lojas físicas para clareza |
| Pareto obsession | 20% de esforço → 80% de resultado. Rapid research, quick credibility, start small |
| Case study teaching | Ensina através de exemplos reais (Frank Kern funnel, marathon targeting, Nike) |
| Anti-complexity | Simplifica obsessivamente — "keep it nice and simple", "don't overcomplicate" |

---

## FRASES CARACTERÍSTICAS

- "Start with the user"
- "Be there and be useful"
- "YouTube advertising is a game of customer moments"
- "Want to know, want to do, want to buy"
- "Window shopper, in-store shopper, checkout shopper"
- "So you can..."
- "Keep it nice and simple"
- "Just make the damn thing and see what happens"
- "When everyone zigs, you zag"
- "Schema violation"
